basic_details.short_information: Airports Authority of India (AAI) Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on 14-05-2026 on the official website [aai.aero]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AAI Advisor Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 65 years of age who have a Professional degree in Law (3 years regular course after graduation OR 5 years integrated regular course after 10+2) and retired Central/State Government employees with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Advisor vacancies. The email application process for AAI Advisor Recruitment 2026 has started on 14-05-2026 and will remain o

qualification.education_qualification: Professional degree in Law (3 years regular course after graduation OR 5 years integrated regular course after 10+2), Eligible to enroll as an Advocate.
qualification.details: Professional degree in Law (3 years regular course after graduation OR 5 years integrated regular course after 10+2). Eligible to enroll as an Advocate to practice in courts in India. Retired Central/State Government employees in Pay Matrix Level-14 and above (as per 7th CPC) and in case of CPSEs, employees with pay scale equivalent to E-6 level and above (as per 3rd PRC). Minimum 20 years of Executive experience of handling litigations related to Service matters/Civil matters/Arbitrations etc. in any Central or State Government Ministry/Department/PSU.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Advisor Law Deptt at RHQ (Western Region), Mumbai

selection_process: Submission of application via email Shortlisting Application verification Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AAI Advisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
